description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, angular fuselage in teal blue with a prominent, wide, semi-circular main rotor disk rendered in a metallic gray with geometric paneling. The cockpit is sharply pointed and set low, with a faceted canopy that blends into the body. Two long, triangular side structures extend forward from the main body, each with a pale yellow underside, giving the helicopter a futuristic, aggressive appearance. The landing gear consists of two simple, black skids visible beneath the tail section. The main rotor is large and flat, with a segmented, mechanical look, while the tail section is compact and lacks a visible tail rotor. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible registration markings or detailed cockpit windows.
description: A teal blue, angular helicopter with a wide, segmented gray main rotor and long, triangular side structures. It features black landing skids and a minimalistic, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed cockpit, angular teal body, and the wide, segmented main rotor disk overhead.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long, triangular side structure and the thin profile of the main rotor disk.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the semi-circular main rotor disk, the compact tail, and the black landing skids.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, side structure, and rotor disk from the opposite angle.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor consists of a wide, semi-circular disk with multiple segmented panels, appearing metallic gray. Individual blades are not distinctly visible; the disk suggests a stylized or shielded rotor design.
attribute_landing_skids: Two simple, black landing skids are present, straight and parallel, with no visible crossbars or footpads.
